name: ireview
description: Universal AI-to-AI code review. Any model reviews your code — DeepSeek, GPT, Gemini, Llama, or local Ollama. Zero dependencies. One JSON config.

hooks.prompt: iReview loaded. If script output says 'No config found', tell user once: 'iReview needs a config — run: cp .ireview.example.json .ireview.json then edit model and api_key.' Otherwise, stay silent. Check .ireview/reviews/ for unresolved findings from previous sessions and mention them briefly.

iReview stop gate triggered. Read .ireview/state.json. If status=pending: get the diff with 'git diff HEAD', read .ireview.json for config, then call the review API per skills/ireview/SKILL.md instructions. If diff exceeds 500 lines, summarize changes by file instead of sending full diff. Save results to .ireview/reviews/review-$(date +%s).md. If critical issues found, report them and suggest fixes. If LGTM, allow stop. If state.json missing or status!=pending, allow stop silently.
Context compacting. If any review is in progress, save current findings to .ireview/reviews/ before compaction.
